purpose: Measurement matrix only. Reviewer path-to-release, product positioning, and 24/48-hour plan live in canonicalPathToRelease.

step1.name: setup
step1.question: Can the user or harness reach the intended STT engine with the right account, tier, build mode, STT mode, model/provider/runtime, mic/input route, and instrumentation?
step1.rule: Do not score accuracy, timing, or release quality when setup fails.

step2.name: proof
step2.question: Once setup is proven, does the STT path meet runtime, timing, accuracy, and journey expectations versus its baseline?
step2.rule: Name the first broken proof phase and gate.

rules: No setup proof, no STT scoring.
Every failure must identify one error phase: setup, runtime, timing, accuracy, or journey.
Every setup failure must name the exact setup gate.
Every proof failure must name the exact proof phase and gate.

setupGates.passCondition: Correct build mode, app URL, secrets, and test/live mode are proven.
User is signed in and effective Free/Pro tier matches the STT path.
Intended STT mode is visible and machine-readable.
Intended model/provider can be reached and is ready or explicitly downloading.
Runtime/provider/device/thread/fallback telemetry is populated before scoring.
Requested mic constraints or human-mic/input route are captured and valid.
Required logs, timing fields, transcript states, and artifact writers are populated.

proofGates.passCondition: Correct STT provider/runtime actually handles the run; no unintended fallback.
First usable interim/draft/final text appears within the mode budget.
Finalization and detail visibility are within the mode-specific budget.
Final transcript preserves beginning, middle, tail, and expected length.
Accuracy, filler recall, and false filler insertion meet baseline/target.
Terminal punctuation, sentence boundaries, casing, no run-on text, no duplication.
Stop selects the intended transcript and saved/history/detail match it.

currentBuckets.reason: Current-head run 26852510533: v4 auth/mode/setup button passed, but worker failed WebGPU adapter/backend acquisition, app entered INIT_FAILED, and Start stayed disabled. No accuracy score is valid.

Current exact-buffer run 26856565454 on commit 171a055c passed the h1_6 guard at 87.5% and populated runtime telemetry: wasm-singlethread, transformers-js, cloudFallbackAttempted=false. Full Private v2/v4 browser release proof is still pending run 26856683929.
Current-head run 26850691978 closed request/session validity; keyterms still hurt h1_6 accuracy.
Chrome produced words, but readability and stop/save/detail failed.

retiredCandidates.reason: Retired from release-candidate comparison because washington_01 measured materially lower accuracy than v2/v4 while v4 is already the latest stable @huggingface/transformers line.

metricGate: Each visible STT path must match or exceed its corresponding drop-in/customer baseline on product metrics, or be caveated/de-emphasized. Release interpretation lives in canonicalPathToRelease.

metricContract.accuracyPct: Not materially worse than drop-in/customer baseline.
metricContract.sentenceCount: Roughly matches expected script sentence count.
metricContract.maxRunOnWords: No sentence-like span over 45 words; 35 preferred.
metricContract.readabilityVerdict: Pass/fail summary of punctuation, casing, and duplication.
metricContract.finalizationWaitMs: Short speech target <=8000; hard limit <=12000. 60s speech target <=20000; hard limit <=30000.

results.transcript: On the one hand, I was summoned by my country, whose voice I can never hear but with veneration and love, from a retreat which I had chosen with the fondest predilection, and, in my flattering hopes, with an immutable decision, as the asylum of my declining years, on the other hand, the magnitude and difficulty of the trust to which the voice of my country called me, being sufficient to awaken in the wisest and most experienced of her citizens a distrustful scrutiny into his qualifications, could not but overwhelm with despondence one who ought to be peculiarly conscious of his own deficiencies. In this conflict of emotions all I dare a veris that it has been my faithful study to collect my duty from a just appreciation of every circumstance by which it might be affected. All I dare hope is that if, in executing this task, I have been too much swayed by a grateful remembrance of former instances. My error will be palliated by the motives which mislead me, and its consequences be judged by my country with some share of the partiality in which they originated.

results.currentRead: Full-duration browser proof after early-stop harness fix. Setup/saveCandidate path works, but v2 final quality is below parity.
Setup/mic reaches recording and non-silent audio enters inference repeatedly, but v4 emits no usable transcript/saveCandidate. This is runtime/config failure, not accuracy proof.

The v2 decoder and app-required long-form options can decode the original source fixture near parity. This is the control proving the model/options are not the first bad boundary for the current browser proof.

The exact final WAV buffer captured by the browser app decodes badly offline through the same v2 Node/drop-in path. Because the original source fixture decodes at 94.25%, the current v2 browser failure follows the captured audio buffer rather than saveCandidate selection, DOM extraction, or basic worker options.

results.runtimeError: invalid data location: undefined for input "a"
results.currentRead: v4 reaches recording and starts inference, but browser backend inference fails repeatedly and emits no transcript/saveCandidate. Do not score v4 accuracy until this runtime/backend error is fixed.

results.setupCaveat: Harness clicked the Private setup/download control automatically. Do not use this artifact as first-time setup/download consent proof.

results.currentRead: Private v2 human real-mic quality is materially better than the Native human run, but it is not green: setup consent was invalidated by auto-click, filler recall missed um, readability failed, and history/detail failed in the artifact.

cloud.reason: Larger credentialed h1 subset on current code is valid: baseline 97.78% accuracy / 90% filler recall; keyterms 95% / 100%. Baseline is the safest current Cloud candidate. Keyterms improves filler recall but still hurts h1_6 accuracy, so it is not shippable as default. Live Cloud app journey proof runs 26853283325 and 26854235595 passed stop/save/history-detail smoke with provider final+termination and 363-character saved results. Cloud token gate proof run 26853914030 passed: missing auth/free/trial/over-quota do not mint tokens, paid Pro does.
cloud.next: Launch/position Cloud baseline as quality path if remaining timeline/readability proof passes. Dev/product should change, narrow, or disable keyterms before defaulting it. Test should run Cloud long-script/tail proof that exports __CLOUD_STT_TIMELINE__, WER/readability, and scripted tail comparison.

private.reason: Current replay evidence on commit 89006629 shows v2 source fixture decodes at 94.25% with return_timestamps:true, but the exact browser-captured final WAV buffer from run 26858549345 decodes at only 62.07% offline through the same Node/drop-in v2 path. The v2 bad result therefore follows the browser input/audio buffer, not DOM extraction, saveCandidate selection, or basic worker options. v4 reaches recording and starts inference but repeatedly fails with `invalid data location: undefined for input "a"`, producing no transcript/saveCandidate.
private.next: Dev/test should first validate or fix the v2 browser audio input/capture route: fake-audio route, WebRTC/DSP constraints, resampling, gain/clipping, and final-buffer assembly. Separately fix v4 browser worker runtime/backend no-output before scoring v4 accuracy. Test reruns after either fix using saveCandidate and exact captured WAV replay.

native.reason: Human real-mic rerun on 2026-06-03 improved authoritative save selection: selectedForSave came from service_result, save passed, history was visible, and full-speech duplication did not recur. Native still failed product readiness: user-visible interim/final text was not clearly trust-labeled while revising, earliest trace events were lost to the 500-event cap, filler recall was 66.67%, readability/punctuation/casing failed, and detail transcript extraction was empty.
native.next: Fix trust-state labeling for Native interim/committed live text, increase/full-export Native trace for release proofs, decide/activate Native formatter if Native remains visible, verify detail extraction, then rerun human Chrome mic proof.
